changes: Cast time of applicable actions has been reduced from 1.44 to 1.32 seconds.
Spell recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2.2 seconds.
Shield Smite: Recast time has been increased from 20 to 24 seconds.
Imperator: HP restored by Sacred Claim has been reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Holy Sheltron: Barrier strength has been reduced from a heal potency of 10,000 to 8,000.
Holy Sheltron: The unaspected damage dealt to nearby enemies when the effect expires has been increased from 100% of the remaining barrier potency to 150%.
Onslaught: Potency has been increased from 400-4,000 to 500-5,000.
Orogeny: HP consumed when executed has been reduced from 20% to 10%.
Orogeny: Potency has been increased from 800-8,000 to 1,000-10,000.
Wind's Reply: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 16 seconds.
Meikyo Shisui: Effect duration has been reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Tendo Setsugekka: Range has been increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Range has been increased from 5 to 8 yalms.
Bloodcoil: Recast time has been reduced from 16 to 12 seconds.
Twinfang Bite: Potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Twinblood Bite: Potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Uncoiled Twinfang: Potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Uncoiled Twinblood: Potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Wildfire: The number of attack actions needed to cause the pitch to detonate immediately has been reduced from 5 to 4.
Wildfire: Potency for each attack action landed has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Full Metal Field: Recast time has been reduced from 40 to 32 seconds.
Wreath of Fire: Additional damage potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Flare Star: Potency has been increased from 16,000 to 18,000.
Flare Star: Damage over time duration has been increased from 6 to 9 seconds.
Applicable actions: Cast time has been reduced from 1.44 to 1.32 seconds.
Spell recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2.2 seconds.
Crimson Cyclone: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Necrotize: Recast time has been reduced from 12 to 10 seconds.
Embolden: Increase to damage dealt has been reduced from 10% to 8%.
Embolden: Reduction to damage taken has been reduced from 10% to 8%.
Displacement: Increase to damage and healing potency of next spell cast has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Prefulgence: Potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Prefulgence: Healing potency on self has been reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Prefulgence: Healing potency on party members has been reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Creature Motif: Cast time has been reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds; recast time from 3.5 to 3 seconds.
Living Muse: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 16 seconds.
Pom Motif: Cast time has been reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds; recast time from 3.5 to 3 seconds.
Wing Motif: Cast time has been reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds; recast time from 3.5 to 3 seconds.
Claw Motif: Cast time has been reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds; recast time from 3.5 to 3 seconds.
Maw Motif: Cast time has been reduced from 2.5 to 2 seconds; recast time from 3.5 to 3 seconds.
Pom Muse: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 16 seconds.
Winged Muse: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 16 seconds.
Clawed Muse: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 16 seconds.
Fanged Muse: Recast time has been reduced from 20 to 16 seconds.
Gravity II: Heavy effect duration has been reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Gravity II (After Double Cast): Heavy effect duration has been reduced from 5 to 3 seconds.
Macrocosmos: Potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Macrocosmos: Healing potency granted upon execution has been reduced from 6,000 to 5,000 plus the compiled 25% of damage taken.
Epicycle: Barrier strength has been reduced from a heal potency of 8,000 to 6,000.
Lady of Crowns: Healing potency has been reduced from 8,000 to 6,000.
Lord of Crowns: Potency has been reduced from 8,000 to 6,000.

new_content.name: Futures Rewritten (Ultimate)
new_content.description: The sixth ultimate duty, where the wandering minstrel weaves a ballad of futures rewritten based on the land once blighted by the Flood of Light.

new_content.name: Role Quests (Dawntrail): Prologue
new_content.description: New quests added to the Dawntrail role questline.

new_content.name: New Game+
new_content.description: New chapters have been added to the New Game+ system.

new_content.name: Custom Deliveries Client (Nitowikwe)
new_content.description: A new custom deliveries client scheduled for Patch 7.15.

new_content.name: The Cloud of Darkness (Chaotic)
new_content.description: A new high-end duty scheduled for release one week after Patch 7.15.

new_content.name: Additional Role Quests
new_content.description: Additional role quests scheduled for Patch 7.16.
